metadata.title: Furniture Store | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered furniture store management platform for all your retail operations — from point of sale and eCommerce to custom orders and B2B quotations.

hero.title: Furniture Stores
hero.description: With its ability to handle everything from eCommerce and Point of Sale transactions to custom furniture orders, AdonERP is a complete solution for managing your B2B and B2C sales.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP has been nothing but a good thing for us. From custom furniture orders to B2B quotations, it has worked really well for our growing business.

flexibleProducts.title: Flexible products
flexibleProducts.description: Offer your customers different sizes, colors, and materials in your online store.

pricelists.title: Pricelists
pricelists.description: Manage your B2B and B2C sales through a single website with flexible pricing.

customForms.title: Custom forms
customForms.description: Create custom forms for your website. Customers can request quotes directly online.

posSection.title: In-store check out
posSection.subtitle: made simple

productKits.title: Product kits
productKits.description: Bundle sets of furniture together and sell entire rooms at once.

payNowShipLater.title: Pay now, ship later!
payNowShipLater.description: Automatically generate delivery orders from the point of sale.

posSection.footerMessage: Fast checkout, loyalty perks, and live stock in one furniture store flow.

customOrderSection.title: Custom order?
customOrderSection.subtitle: No problem!
customOrderSection.description: Smart sourcing automatically places purchase orders based on your sales of custom products. Made-to-order custom items are tracked from quotation to manufacturing.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Powerful tools designed to simplify furniture retail operations, from custom orders to multi-channel sales.

list.title: Easy invoicing
list.description: Create professional invoices in seconds and track payments effortlessly.

list.title: Loyalty programs
list.description: Reward returning customers with points, tiered perks, and exclusive discounts.

list.title: Quotation builder
list.description: Generate custom quotes for B2B clients and convert them to orders instantly.

list.title: Free domain name
list.description: Launch your online store with a professional domain included.

list.title: Shipping connectors
list.description: Integrate with major carriers for seamless delivery management.

list.title: Integrated reporting
list.description: Track sales trends, inventory turnover, and profitability in real-time.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your retail operation, finance, supplier flows, and customer communication.

testimonials.name: Ville Kurvato
testimonials.content: AdonERP has been nothing but a good thing for us. From custom furniture orders to B2B quotations, it has worked really well for our growing business.

testimonials.name: Elena Marchetti
testimonials.content: The ability to handle both B2B and B2C sales through a single platform is game-changing. Our team manages everything from one place.

communityBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
communityBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for furniture retailers.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a furniture store workflow that helps your team sell faster, manage custom orders, and scale from one showroom to many.
